__fixture__.name: durable_cache_supersession
__fixture__.scenario: On process restart, a durable search-index cache re-reads its input_digest_set and finds that the canonical content hash of an indexed source file has changed. The supersession check fails; the cache is invalidated and a rebuild begins. While the rebuild runs, subscriptions for derived search results emit freshness = warming (ADR 0005) rather than freshness = authoritative.
adr_sections: Invalidation rules: durable caches re-check input_digest_set on restart
